article_meta.title: The headquarters of the Euroclear financial institute in Brussels Photograph: Nicolas Maeterlinck/Belga Mag/AFP/Getty Im

reasoning: Generally identifies real author-prose bias (loaded adjectives) and a defensible slant observation, but includes quoted language inside a flagged item (minor attribution violation) and misses notable unattributed/weasel phrasing elsewhere.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: The third item’s biasedText includes a quoted phrase ('absolutely critical'), breaching the rule to avoid quoting source language in flagged text. Other items are in author voice.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Both 'urgently needed funds' and 'critical to maintain Kyiv's war effort' are genuine loaded wording in author prose; the Slant claim is defensible given emphasis, so few to no clear false positives.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Misses unattributed/weasel constructions such as 'it is understood the intimidation campaign has been focused on key individuals' and the un-attributed assertion 'Threats have been directed at Valérie Urbain...'.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels for loaded wording as Word Choice are appropriate; Slant label is a reasonable fit for structural emphasis. No clear mislabeling.
